title: Advances in Subsurface Drip Irrigation System Design, Water–Fertilizer Synergy, and Sustainable Wheat Production in Xinjiang
description: SpeakForWater Episode 3: Advances in Subsurface Drip Irrigation System Design, Water–Fertilizer Synergy, and Sustainable Wheat Production in Xinjiang. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
